# Kimi

> AI Registry entry [AIR-82](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-82/kimi) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-20. Departments: office-of-ceo.

**Category:** AI Agent Platform / Foundation Model Assistant
**Cost:** Freemium. Moderato $15; Allegretto $31; Allegro $79; Vivace $159. API priced separately via Moonshot Open Platform.
**Departments:** Office of CEO (requester)
**Entity:** Moonshot AI (Beijing, PRC)

## Overview

Consumer-facing AI assistant from Moonshot AI, Beijing-based foundation-model lab. Powered by Kimi K2.5 model. "Agent-first" — chat plus task-oriented agents for deep research, document creation, spreadsheets, slides, websites, code. Moonshot K-series notable in open-weights community for competitive benchmark performance at lower cost than Western frontier labs.

## Key Products

* **Kimi Chat (K2.5)** — general-purpose conversational with long-context
* **Agent Swarm (Beta)** — multi-agent orchestration (4-8 sub-agents)
* **Deep Research** — autonomous research, structured reports
* **Docs, Slides, Sheets** — AI agents producing working Office files
* **Websites** — AI website builder with one-click deploy
* **Kimi Code** — coding agent with credit-based usage
* **Kimi Claw** — one-click deployable bot/assistant
* **Moonshot Open Platform** — separate API surface at platform.moonshot.ai

## Security & Compliance

* ToS and Privacy Policy published
* **PRC-headquartered — data residency, cross-border transfer posture NOT documented publicly**
* **SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / GDPR posture: NOT stated publicly — TBD**
* **SSO/SAML, enterprise admin controls: NOT stated publicly — TBD**
* MCP / enterprise connector support not confirmed

## Considerations

* **Data residency and jurisdiction** — PRC HQ; until terms documented, treat as public/free-tier under §5.2.3 — **NO internal, confidential, or client data**
* Feature overlap with [[gamma|Gamma]], [[claude-code|Claude Code]], [[cursor|Cursor]], Windsurf, [[gemini|Gemini]] Deep Research
* No public team/enterprise SKU with centralised billing/SSO/admin
* Compliance documentation gap is meaningful gate before pilot
* Two distinct surfaces: consumer Kimi app vs Moonshot Open Platform API — different evaluation surfaces

*Evaluating. Functional tier. Requested by CEO Bonaventure Wong via #ai-internal-hub.*
